name: @ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project @ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard --web

options.command:
mkdir -p dist/containers/{projectName} && docker buildx build --push --file {projectRoot}/Dockerfile --tag ${NX_DOCKER_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}/${NX_DOCKER_REPOSITORY:-ethio-connect}/{projectName}:${NX_IMAGE_TAG:-${NX_TASK_HASH:-latest}} --metadata-file dist/containers/{projectName}/push-metadata.json {projectRoot} && DIGEST=$(python - <<'P'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('dist/containers/{projectName}/push-metadata.json')
j=json.loads(p.read_text()) if p.exists() else {}
print(j.get('containerimage.digest',''))
P
) && printf "{\n  \"project\": \"{projectName}\",\n  \"image\": \"%s/%s/{projectName}:%s\",\n  \"digest\": \"%s\",\n  \"ref\": \"%s/%s/{projectName}@%s\"\n}\n" "${NX_DOCKER_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" "${NX_DOCKER_REPOSITORY:-ethio-connect}" "${NX_IMAGE_TAG:-${NX_TASK_HASH:-latest}}" "$DIGEST" "${NX_DOCKER_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" "${NX_DOCKER_REPOSITORY:-ethio-connect}" "$DIGEST" > dist/containers/{projectName}/image.json
